title: Where Is the Cat?
learningGoal: The learner will accurately synthesize 3 independent English sentences detailing the location of an object, successfully deploying the Preposition + Article + Noun syntax (In the box) while avoiding Hindi-native Postposition syntax (Box in).
instructions: Write three sentences about where a mischievous cat is hiding in a room. You must use 'In' for one sentence, 'On' for one sentence, and 'Under' for one sentence. Do NOT forget the word 'The' after your preposition!

contentItems.text: Remember the golden rule of English locations: First rule = Preposition (In/On/Under). Second rule = The. Third rule = Object.

writingPrompt: Write three sentences describing where the cat is hiding: Once inside a box, once on top of a table, and once beneath a bed.
promptGoal: Demonstrate the ability to completely invert Hindi post-position logic and successfully write English PRE-positions.
referenceHints: Hindi: बिल्ली डिब्बे में है। => English: The cat is IN the box.
Do NOT write: 'The cat is box in'.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: The cat is in the box. The cat is on the table. The cat is under the bed.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: द कैट इज़ इन द बॉक्स। द कैट इज़ ऑन द टेबल। द कैट इज़ अंडर द बेड।
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: बिल्ली डिब्बे में है। बिल्ली मेज़ पर है। बिल्ली बिस्तर के नीचे है।
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect score. The learner successfully decoupled from Hindi post-positions and correctly sandwiched the article 'the' between the preposition and the noun.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: Cat is in box. Cat is on table. Cat is under bed.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: कैट इज़ इन बॉक्स। कैट इज़ ऑन टेबल। कैट इज़ अंडर बेड।
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: बिल्ली डिब्बे में है। बिल्ली मेज़ पर है। बिल्ली बिस्तर के नीचे है।
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Acceptable, but missing the critical 'The' sandwich. However, the preposition order is correct.

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the user place 'In/On/Under' BEFORE the noun? Or did they write 'Table on'?
Did the user successfully deploy all three required prepositions?
Did the user remember to say 'In THE box' instead of just 'In box'?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: The cat is in the box. The cat is on the table. The cat is under the bed.
acceptableAlternates: A cat is in a box. A cat is on a table. A cat is under a bed.
My cat is in the box. The cat is on top of the table. He is under the bed.
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: Must include preposition preceding the location noun.

feedbackRules.onPass: Magnificent! You completely stopped translating directly from Hindi and mastered the English pre-position placement rule.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep practicing! If you wrote 'The cat is the bed under', it is wrong. You MUST bring 'Under' to the front. 'The cat is UNDER the bed.'
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good start! You placed the words in the right order. However, don't forget to use the word 'The'. Try saying 'In the box' rather than 'In box'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Write where the cat is hiding: in a box, on a table, and under a bed.

hintText: To say 'बिस्तर के नीचे' (Bed Under), you must flip it completely to say 'Under the Bed'. Always flip it!
commonMistakes: Writing 'The cat is in the table' (You can't be inside a table... yet).
